subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto acceptance on a Day whereon those who claim knowledge turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی الذی فاز بالاقبال فی یوم فیه اعرض الرجال الذین یدعون العلم من
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for nearness to God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
